title: Aranet Sensor Data Gap and Offline Detection
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| stats latest(_time) as last_seen by sensor_id
| eval age_m=round((now()-last_seen)/60,1)
| where age_m>30
| table sensor_id last_seen age_m
description: Missing telemetry blindfolds compliance and safety dashboards; stale sensors often indicate power, mesh, or gateway faults.
value: Restores observability before regulators or customers notice gaps.
implementation: (1) Prefer `tstats`/metrics last-seen for scale; simplify with per-sensor scheduled search if small. (2) Tune staleness minutes to reporting interval. (3) Auto-ticket RMA.
visualization: Table offline sensors; count single value.
grandmaExplanation: We find sensors that stopped reporting so blind spots do not linger.
